_README: Predefined contact points for hand-object and hand-hand optimization.
MANO meshes have 778 vertices (mano_vid in 0..777) — same topology for left and right.
obj_vid is an index into the vertex array of the mesh at club_mesh_path (0 .. N-1).
Use utils/vis_predefined_contacts.py to look up which vertex sits where on the mesh.
Edit this file while the viewer is running — points refresh on save.
hand_attract_tips: MANO vertex ids on each hand that the SportGS force-closure
stage attracts toward the nearest club vertex (via knn_points + FCLoss).
Loaded by model/SportGS/utils/contact_config.py and used in render_mesh.force_closure.
